answer:
Hi! To register as a new voter, just follow these steps:
• Visit voters.eci.gov.in
• Fill out Form 6 online
• Upload your photo and documents
You can also use the Voter Helpline App!

You'll need these documents ready:
• Identity Proof (Aadhaar or PAN)
• Age Proof (Birth Certificate)
• Address Proof (Bank Passbook or Utility Bill)
Keep them scanned and ready to upload!

Finding your booth is easy! Just:
• Enter your PIN code in our 'Find My Booth' tab
• Or search your EPIC number on the ECI website
We'll show you exactly where to go on voting day!

Voting is a proud right! You're eligible if:
• You are an Indian citizen
• You've turned 18 by the qualifying date
Ready to make your voice heard?

Tracking your application is simple:
• Use the Reference ID from your registration
• Visit the NVSP portal's tracking section
It usually takes a few weeks to process!
